abstract: Cost-aware architecture skill inspired by The Frugal Architect and adapted for The Boring JavaScript Stack. Covers cost as a non-functional requirement, alignment between system design and business economics, explicit architectural trade-offs, observability, cost controls, incremental optimization, and questioning stale assumptions when building with Sails.js, Inertia.js, Waterline, Shipwright, Quest, Realtime, and related stack capabilities.
